provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship commander in her late 50s with silver hair pulled back severely and a face that has made hard calls under pressure for thirty years, wearing a long navy bridge coat over a steel-blue uniform with tarnished gold shoulder boards and cuff rings, the coat reaches mid-calf and shows fraying at the hem from years of narrow corridors and airlock thresholds, a rigid encrypted document case in one hand, polished but deeply scuffed composite boots, an antique brass chronometer on her wrist that is the only non-regulation item she carries, everything about her says institutional authority worn like a second skin
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Navy bridge coat with gold cuff rings and ribbon bar, standing in a ship corridor with control panels. The coat fits the worn institutional authority perfectly. Best commander yet.
